info.title: MoEST Monitoring & Evaluation API Portal
info.description: Unified Multi-Framework Results-Based Management (RBM) API engine for MoEST. Coordinates indicators, targets, strategic projects, and actual education progress data streams.

get.description: Returns counts for total activities, indicators tracked, and pending data entries.
Calculates target met percentage and splits entries by region for a given KPI.

post.description: Verifies user credentials and logs access history in the e-GA audit trail.
Registers a new system user. Restricted to authorized administrators.

get.description: Returns list of all registered actors and their associated permissions.

put.description: Updates details, role, and custom scopes for a user.

delete.description: Removes a user account from the registry.

get.description: Returns list of all system roles and their default system permission scopes.

description.example: Manages indicator registry parameters, creates frameworks, and verifies submissions.

post.description: Registers a new system role with a starting default permission set. Restricted to System Administrator role.

description.example: Role for temporary QA inspectorial audits.

put.description: Updates description and default permissions list for a role. Restricted to System Administrator.

delete.description: Deletes the role configuration. Cannot delete the 'System Administrator' core configuration. Restricted to System Administrator.

422.description: Validation Exception - cannot delete System Administrator

get.summary: Get nodes belonging to a project

delete.description: Cannot delete if node has children.

get.summary: Get nodes for a strategic framework

delete.description: Cannot delete if node has children.

get.summary: Get targets mapping for an indicator

put.description: Edits the entry value. If already Verified or Approved, updating the value resets its status to 'Submitted'.

post.description: Transitions record status to 'Verified'. Requires verify_data permission.
Transitions record status to 'Approved'. Requires approve_data permission.

post.summary: Map activity to results chain node

get.description: Resolves reporting parameters to compile dynamic reports data lists.

get.summary: Get e-GA system audit trail logs
get.description: Returns logs of all system-wide updates, sync actions, and user session logins.
